def positive_storage_write_returns_driver_specific_object():
    rule_id = "storage_write_returns_driver_specific_object"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag write helpers that return raw driver, session, or cursor objects instead of stable application data."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
